title: Transfer Lab: Repair a Multilingual Transit Status Board
summary: Transfer Lab: Repair a Multilingual Transit Status Board retrieves prior skills in an original unfamiliar long-content media input and container regression scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply responsive mobile first, responsive content breakpoints, responsive media queries, responsive images, responsive embedded media, responsive container queries, responsive test matrix in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real unfamiliar long-content media input and container regression artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Unfamiliar long-content media input and container regression case 18: setting max-width one hundred percent prevents an oversized image download.
